qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I made a mistake and renewed my Alliance account with the wrong role?
qa_pairs.answer: You should create a new role using your current information and update your account with this new role. To do this, log into CCDB and, from the main menu under 'My Account', select 'Apply for a new role'. You will then follow the instructions to select your new role.

qa_pairs.question: How is my sponsor notified after I apply for a new role to correct a renewal error?
qa_pairs.answer: Your sponsor will receive an email that includes a link to a page where they can confirm your new role.

qa_pairs.question: What will happen to my old role if I create a new one to correct a renewal mistake?
qa_pairs.answer: If your old role is not renewed, it will automatically expire and be deactivated on the morning of June 11, 2025.
